headline: Aflac, Allstate & Everest Step Up: Who's Ready to Insure a Q1 Beat?
summary: AFL, ALL and EG report Q1 results tomorrow as investors track underwriting strength, pricing trends and investment income tailwinds.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on The Hartford Insurance Gr, Raises Price Target to $159
summary: Mizuho  analyst Yaron Kinar   maintains The Hartford Insurance Gr (NYSE:HIG) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $158 to $159.
